title: Frequently Asked Questions
subtitle: Answers to the most important questions about your online booking system.

items.question: How long does it take to develop a booking system?
items.answer: Depending on the scope, development takes 3-8 weeks. A starter system can go live in 3-4 weeks, while more complex enterprise solutions require 6-8 weeks.

items.question: Can I expand the system later?
items.answer: Yes, all our systems are modular. You can add new features at any time, such as online payment, SMS reminders or additional languages.

items.question: Which payment providers are supported?
items.answer: We integrate Stripe, PayPal, Klarna and other payment providers. The integration is individually adapted to your needs.

items.question: Is the system GDPR compliant?
items.answer: Yes, all our booking systems are fully GDPR compliant. Data is stored on European servers and transmitted encrypted.

items.question: Do I need technical knowledge to manage it?
items.answer: No, the admin dashboard is intuitively designed. We also offer training for your team.

items.question: What happens after launch?
items.answer: Depending on the package, you receive 3-12 months of technical support. After that, we offer optional maintenance contracts for updates, security and further development.

items.question: Can the system be integrated into my existing website?
items.answer: Yes, we can develop the booking system as a standalone solution or as an integration into your existing website.

items.question: Which industries use online booking systems?
items.answer: Our systems are used by medical practices, hairdressers, coaches, fitness studios, restaurants, hotels and many other industries.
